name: Ashburn Senior Center
description: Ashburn Senior Center is a place to play pickleball in Ashburn, VA. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Ashburn Village Sports Pavilion
description: Come play pickleball at Ashburn Village Sports Pavilion in Ashburn, VA! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Broadlands Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Broadlands Courts in Broadlands, VA! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. You can reserve the courts. The courts are private.

name: Carver Center
description: Come play pickleball at Carver Center in Purcellville, VA! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: CountrySide court near CountrySide elementary
description: CountrySide court near CountrySide elementary is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, VA. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play.

name: Douglass Community Center
description: Private, but it is open to the public with a $3 entrance fee. Call for day specific court availability.

name: Franklin Park
description: Come play pickleball at Franklin Park in Purcellville, VA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Hal and Berni Hanson Regional Park
description: Hal and Berni Hanson Regional Park is a place to play pickleball in Aldie, VA. There are 14 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Hogge Park
description: Come play pickleball at Hogge Park in United States, VA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Open as long as the park os open

name: Ida Lee Park Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Ida Lee Park Recreation Center in Leesburg, VA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, locker rooms, wheelchair accessibility, and water. The courts are free.

name: Lakes Community Center
description: Lakes Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ashburn, VA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights.

name: Leesburg Senior Center
description: Come play pickleball at Leesburg Senior Center in Leesburg, VA! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The court cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: See the Leesburg senior center schedule for specific play times.
fees: Fee required — Membership Annual memberships are $32 for residents and $48 for non-residents

name: Loudoun Valley Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Loudoun Valley Community Center in Purcellville, VA! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Lovettsville Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Lovettsville Community Center in Lovettsville, VA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Lucketts Community Center
description: Lucketts Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Leesburg, VA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Potomac Green Community Center
description: This is a private community. You must be a resident or invited guest accompanied by a resident

name: Potomac Green Neighborhood Park
description: Come play pickleball at Potomac Green Neighborhood Park in Ashburn, VA! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: The Stone House
description: These courts are private property for the exclusive use of the Cascades Residents and owners.

name: Village Pickle
description: Village Pickle is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Leesburg, VA. There are 8 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, a pro shop or equipment store, and youth programming. The courts can be reserved.

description: Woods Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Ashburn, VA. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
